package handler

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "golang.org/x/sync/errgroup"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "net/http"
)

// Negative scenario for errgroup_fanout_without_limit_in_handler: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: errgroup goroutine fanout without a visible concurrency limit in handlers.
type CaseErrgroupFanoutWithoutLimitInHandlerDTO struct {
    ID       string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status   string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount   int    `json:"amount"`
    Payload  []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseErrgroupFanoutWithoutLimitInHandlerModel struct {
    ID        string       `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID  string       `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status    string       `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseErrgroupFanoutWithoutLimitInHandlerRepository struct {
    db    *gorm.DB
    sql   *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseErrgroupFanoutWithoutLimitInHandlerModel
}

type CaseErrgroupFanoutWithoutLimitInHandlerService struct {
    repo   *CaseErrgroupFanoutWithoutLimitInHandlerRepository
    client *http.Client
}

type CaseErrgroupFanoutWithoutLimitInHandlerAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeErrgroupFanoutWithoutLimitInHandler(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseErrgroupFanoutWithoutLimitInHandlerDTO) error {
    // errgroup with SetLimit — bounded concurrency.
    g, ctx := errgroup.WithContext(ctx)
    g.SetLimit(5)
    for _, item := range items {
        item := item
        g.Go(func() error {
            req, _ := http.NewRequestWithContext(ctx, http.MethodGet, input+"/"+item.ID, nil)
            resp, err := client.Do(req)
            if err != nil {
                return err
            }
            resp.Body.Close()
            return nil
        })
    }
    if err := g.Wait(); err != nil {
        c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
        return err
    }
    c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"processed": len(items)})
    return nil
}
